compliance_jobs.name: Tax Filing & Returns
compliance_jobs.description: Income tax, corporate tax, and statutory annual filings to local tax authorities

compliance_jobs.name: VAT/GST Compliance
compliance_jobs.description: Indirect tax calculation, return filing, and real-time reporting to government portals

compliance_jobs.name: E-Invoicing
compliance_jobs.description: Generating, transmitting, and receiving invoices in government-mandated digital formats

compliance_jobs.name: Payroll Tax & Social Contributions
compliance_jobs.description: Withholding, pension/social security calculations, and employer filings

compliance_jobs.name: Local GAAP & Statutory Reporting
compliance_jobs.description: Chart of accounts, financial statement formats, and regulatory filings

compliance_jobs.name: Banking & Payments Compliance
compliance_jobs.description: Local bank feeds, payment rails, IBAN/SEPA, and open banking connectivity

tax_filing.title: UAE Corporate Tax — 9% from June 2023
tax_filing.summary: Federal corporate tax 9% on profits above AED 375K introduced June 2023; annual filing.

vat_gst.title: UAE VAT — 5% standard rate
vat_gst.summary: 5% VAT introduced 2018; quarterly/annual returns to Federal Tax Authority.

e_invoicing.title: UAE e-invoicing Phase 3 (real-time clearance) by 2026
e_invoicing.summary: Phase 3 with real-time clearance, ZATCA-aligned model, PEPPOL-based 5-corner; targeted 2026.

payroll.title: GPSSA pension for UAE nationals only
payroll.summary: No personal income tax; GPSSA pension contributions for UAE nationals only (~12.5% employer).

local_gaap.title: IFRS mandatory
local_gaap.summary: IFRS mandatory for all UAE entities subject to corporate tax.

banking_payments.title: Open banking emerging + UAE Pass
banking_payments.summary: Open banking framework emerging; UAE Pass digital identity for payments.

e_invoicing.title: Factura Electrónica AFIP
e_invoicing.summary: Universal e-invoicing for all AFIP-registered taxpayers.

vat_gst.title: Austrian VAT — monthly/quarterly
vat_gst.summary: Standard 20% / 13% / 10% rates.

tax_filing.title: Annual income tax + BAS for GST
tax_filing.summary: Annual income tax return; Business Activity Statement (BAS) quarterly/monthly for GST and PAYG.

vat_gst.title: Australian GST — 10% quarterly/monthly BAS
vat_gst.summary: 10% GST; quarterly or monthly BAS to ATO.

e_invoicing.title: PEPPOL mandatory for Commonwealth agencies by Dec 2026
e_invoicing.summary: All Commonwealth agencies must process Peppol e-invoices by Dec 2026; growing B2B PEPPOL voluntary adoption.

payroll.title: Single Touch Payroll Phase 2 + Superannuation 11.5%
payroll.summary: MEDIUM complexity: Superannuation 11.5% (rising to 12% Jul 2025); STP Phase 2 real-time reporting to ATO.

local_gaap.title: AASB standards (IFRS-aligned)
local_gaap.summary: AASB standards substantially aligned with IFRS; some local divergences.

banking_payments.title: Consumer Data Right (CDR) + NPP instant payments
banking_payments.summary: CDR open banking continues to expand to non-bank lenders/energy; New Payments Platform (NPP) for instant payments.

vat_gst.title: Bangladesh VAT — 15%
vat_gst.summary: 15% VAT; monthly returns to NBR.

tax_filing.title: Annual corporate tax (Impôt des sociétés)
tax_filing.summary: Annual return; corporate rate 25% (20% small enterprise rate on first €100K).

vat_gst.title: Belgian VAT — monthly/quarterly returns
vat_gst.summary: Standard 21% / 12% / 6% rates. Monthly above threshold; quarterly otherwise. Intervat portal.

e_invoicing.title: Belgium B2B e-invoicing — Jan 2026
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory structured B2B e-invoicing via PEPPOL from 1 January 2026.

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + Bancontact
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 open banking, SEPA rails. Bancontact dominant for Belgian payments.

e_invoicing.title: Sistema de Facturación Electrónica
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory e-invoicing via SIN; phased rollout.

tax_filing.title: SPED ecosystem (ECD / ECF / EFD); monthly obligations
tax_filing.summary: SPED Contábil (ECD), SPED Fiscal (ECF), EFD-Contribuições; monthly digital obligations.

vat_gst.title: EXTREME: ICMS / IPI / PIS / COFINS / ISS — cascading taxes
vat_gst.summary: EXTREME complexity: 5+ overlapping indirect tax regimes (state ICMS, federal IPI/PIS/COFINS, municipal ISS); cascading and partly non-creditable.

vat_gst.title: Brazil indirect tax reform (CBS/IBS) — phased 2026-2033
vat_gst.summary: Constitutional tax reform replaces PIS/COFINS/ICMS/ISS with CBS (federal) and IBS (state/municipal); test phase 2026, full transition through 2033.

e_invoicing.title: NF-e / NFS-e via SEFAZ — clearance model since 2006
e_invoicing.summary: Universal NF-e for goods; new national NFS-e standard rolling out for services. Real-time clearance — invoice not legally valid until SEFAZ accepts.

payroll.title: EXTREME: INSS + FGTS + 13th salary + eSocial
payroll.summary: EXTREME complexity: INSS social security (20%) + FGTS (8%) + mandatory 13th-month salary + eSocial real-time payroll reporting; ~35% employer burden.

local_gaap.title: Brazilian GAAP (CPC) aligned with IFRS
local_gaap.summary: CPC (Comitê de Pronunciamentos Contábeis) standards aligned with IFRS; tax CoA used for SPED.

banking_payments.title: PIX instant payments + Open Finance Brazil (Phase 4)
banking_payments.summary: PIX dominant for real-time payments since 2020; Open Finance Brazil now in Phase 4 with payment initiation.

tax_filing.title: T2 corporate tax — e-file mandatory >$1M (now lower)
tax_filing.summary: Mandatory electronic filing of T2 returns; threshold continues to be reduced.

vat_gst.title: GST/HST + provincial QST
vat_gst.summary: 5% federal GST + provincial HST/QST/PST; quarterly/annual returns. Digital economy rules since Jul 2021.

e_invoicing.title: No e-invoicing mandate — voluntary
e_invoicing.summary: No federal mandate currently; voluntary B2B/B2G adoption growing.

payroll.title: CPP + EI contributions
payroll.summary: LOW-MEDIUM complexity: CPP (~5.95%) + EI (~2.32%) employer share; straightforward.

local_gaap.title: IFRS or ASPE
local_gaap.summary: Public companies IFRS; private enterprises ASPE (Accounting Standards for Private Enterprises).

banking_payments.title: Open banking framework emerging
banking_payments.summary: Federal open banking framework legislation pending (2024-2025); Interac dominant for payments.

banking_payments.title: Real-Time Rail (RTR)
banking_payments.summary: Payments Canada Real-Time Rail go-live target window late 2026 / Q1 2027.

vat_gst.title: Swiss VAT — quarterly returns
vat_gst.summary: Standard 8.1% / reduced 2.6% / lodging 3.8% rates (raised Jan 2024).

vat_gst.title: Chilean IVA — 19%
vat_gst.summary: 19% IVA; monthly returns to SII.

e_invoicing.title: Documento Tributario Electrónico (DTE)
e_invoicing.summary: Universal e-invoicing via SII; all taxpayers issue DTEs.

e_invoicing.title: China fully digitalised e-fapiao rollout
e_invoicing.summary: Phased nationwide rollout of fully digitalised e-fapiao; covering all provinces by 2026.

e_invoicing.title: DIAN e-invoicing + Nómina Electrónica
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory electronic invoicing AND e-payroll (Nómina Electrónica) via DIAN.

e_invoicing.title: Costa Rica Comprobante Electrónico
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory e-invoicing via Hacienda for all taxpayers.

vat_gst.title: Czech VAT
vat_gst.summary: Standard 21% / reduced 12% (consolidated 2024) rates.

tax_filing.title: Annual corporate tax (Körperschaftsteuer)
tax_filing.summary: Annual return via ELSTER; corporate rate 15% + 5.5% solidarity surcharge + trade tax. Mandatory E-Bilanz electronic balance sheet to tax authority.

tax_filing.title: E-Bilanz (electronic balance sheet)
tax_filing.summary: All commercial enterprises must submit electronic balance sheet via ELSTER per §5b EStG.

tax_filing.title: Jahresabschluss (annual accounts) filing
tax_filing.summary: Annual financial statements filed with Bundesanzeiger; size-based disclosure rules per HGB §325.

vat_gst.title: German VAT — monthly/quarterly returns
vat_gst.summary: Standard 19% / reduced 7% rates. Monthly returns for higher-volume; quarterly otherwise. Filed via ELSTER.

e_invoicing.title: Germany B2B e-invoicing — receiving capability mandatory
e_invoicing.summary: From 1 Jan 2025 all German B2B businesses must be able to receive structured e-invoices (XRechnung / ZUGFeRD / PEPPOL). Wachstumschancengesetz.

e_invoicing.title: Germany e-invoicing sending mandatory >€800K
e_invoicing.summary: Issuance of structured e-invoices mandatory for businesses with annual revenue >€800K from 1 Jan 2027.

e_invoicing.title: Germany e-invoicing sending mandatory — all businesses
e_invoicing.summary: Issuance mandatory for ALL B2B regardless of size from 1 Jan 2028.

payroll.title: German payroll — ~21% employer social burden
payroll.summary: Social security, health, pension, unemployment, long-term care contributions. ELSTER reporting. HIGH complexity. Strong DATEV ecosystem for accountants.

local_gaap.title: Handelsgesetzbuch (HGB) — German local GAAP
local_gaap.summary: HGB is local GAAP for unconsolidated/SMB statutory accounts; differs significantly from IFRS. Standardkontenrahmen (SKR 03/04) chart of accounts universally expected (DATEV).

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + DATEV bank integration
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 open banking + SEPA rails. DATEV bank-feed integration is critical for the German accountant channel.

vat_gst.title: Danish VAT (moms) — quarterly/monthly
vat_gst.summary: Standard 25% rate (no reduced rates).

local_gaap.title: Bookkeeping Act 2024 — digital bookkeeping
local_gaap.summary: New Bookkeeping Act requires registered digital bookkeeping systems with backup; phased rollout 2024-2026.

e_invoicing.title: Comprobante Fiscal Electrónico (e-CF)
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory e-CF via DGII; phased rollout completing 2026.

e_invoicing.title: Ecuador electronic receipts
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory electronic receipts via SRI for all taxpayers.

vat_gst.title: Egyptian VAT — 14%
vat_gst.summary: 14% VAT; monthly returns to Egyptian Tax Authority.

e_invoicing.title: Egypt e-invoicing system
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory e-invoicing for all VAT-registered businesses; phased rollout completed 2023.

tax_filing.title: Modelo 200 — annual corporate tax + Modelo 303/390 VAT
tax_filing.summary: Corporate income tax via Modelo 200; VAT via Modelo 303 (quarterly/monthly) and Modelo 390 (annual recap).

vat_gst.title: SII real-time VAT reporting (4-day window)
vat_gst.summary: Suministro Inmediato de Información — large taxpayers must transmit invoice data to AEAT within 4 working days. Standard 21% / 10% / 4% rates.

e_invoicing.title: Verifactu (Royal Decree 1007/2023) certified billing software
e_invoicing.summary: Certified billing software requirements; companies adopt from 1 Jul 2025; self-employed from 1 Jan 2026.

e_invoicing.title: Crea y Crece B2B e-invoicing — ~2027
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory B2B e-invoicing under Crea y Crece law; structured XML via AEAT (SII/VeriFactu) — phased rollout pending technical regulation.

payroll.title: Spanish social security — ~30% employer
payroll.summary: HIGH: ~30% employer contribution (social security, contingencies). Quarterly or annual payroll tax.

local_gaap.title: Plan General de Contabilidad (PGC)
local_gaap.summary: Mandatory chart of accounts structure for Spanish entities; SMBs use PGC for statutory accounts.

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + Bizum mobile payments
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 open banking + SEPA. Bizum is dominant for instant P2P/B2C payments in Spain.

vat_gst.title: Finnish VAT — monthly/quarterly
vat_gst.summary: Standard 25.5% (raised Sep 2024) / 14% / 10% rates.

tax_filing.title: Annual corporate tax (IS) + monthly advance payments
tax_filing.summary: Corporate income tax filed annually with monthly advance payments (acomptes); standard rate 25%.

tax_filing.title: Annual filing to Greffe du Tribunal de Commerce
tax_filing.summary: All registered companies must file annual accounts with the commercial court registry.

vat_gst.title: French VAT — monthly/quarterly returns
vat_gst.summary: Standard 20% / 10% / 5.5% rates. Monthly returns for businesses above thresholds; quarterly for others. CA3 form via impots.gouv.fr.

e_invoicing.title: France B2B e-invoicing — Sep 2026 (large) / Sep 2027 (all)
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory B2B e-invoicing via Plateformes de Dématérialisation Partenaires (PDP). Receiving capability + large-enterprise issuance Sep 2026; all enterprises Sep 2027. Factur-X / UBL 2.1 / CII via Chorus Pro.

payroll.title: URSSAF / DSN monthly social filings
payroll.summary: EXTREME complexity: ~43% employer social contributions including pension, unemployment, transport, training, housing levies. Monthly DSN (Déclaration Sociale Nominative) filing.

local_gaap.title: Plan Comptable Général (PCG) — mandatory chart of accounts
local_gaap.summary: Mandatory 1-9 class structure; all French businesses must use PCG. Significant divergence from IFRS; SMBs use PCG for statutory accounts.

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + strong open banking
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 open banking APIs across French banks; SEPA Credit Transfer/Direct Debit/Instant. Strong aggregator market (TrueLayer, Tink, Salt Edge).

tax_filing.title: Annual Corporation Tax (CT600)
tax_filing.summary: Companies file CT600 within 12 months of accounting period end; payment within 9 months and 1 day. Mandatory iXBRL tagging for accounts.

tax_filing.title: MTD for Income Tax Self Assessment (ITSA) — sole traders >£50K
tax_filing.summary: Mandatory MTD ITSA quarterly digital reporting from April 2026 for sole traders & landlords with income >£50K; >£30K from April 2027.

vat_gst.title: Making Tax Digital for VAT
vat_gst.summary: All VAT-registered businesses must keep digital records and file VAT returns through MTD-compatible software. Standard 20% / reduced 5% / zero rates.

e_invoicing.title: UK e-invoicing consultation (no B2B mandate yet)
e_invoicing.summary: HMRC and DBT consultation on standardising UK e-invoicing; currently no B2B mandate. UK is post-audit / PEPPOL-direction.

payroll.title: PAYE Real Time Information (RTI)
payroll.summary: Employers report PAYE on/before each payday via FPS submissions. ~15% employer burden (NI contributions + auto-enrolment pension).

payroll.title: Auto-enrolment workplace pension
payroll.summary: All employers must auto-enrol eligible workers and make minimum pension contributions; ongoing re-enrolment every 3 years.

local_gaap.title: FRS 102 (UK GAAP) — periodic review effective 2026
local_gaap.summary: FRS 102 amendments — new lease accounting and revenue recognition models — apply to periods beginning on or after 1 January 2026.

local_gaap.title: Companies House annual accounts
local_gaap.summary: Annual accounts filed within 9 months of year end; size-based disclosure thresholds (micro/small/medium/large).

banking_payments.title: UK Open Banking (FCA-regulated)
banking_payments.summary: Most mature open banking framework globally. Standardised AISP/PISP APIs across the CMA9 and beyond.

banking_payments.title: Variable Recurring Payments (cVRP) rollout
banking_payments.summary: JROC roadmap for commercial Variable Recurring Payments expanding beyond sweeping use cases.

vat_gst.title: Greek VAT — quarterly/monthly
vat_gst.summary: Standard 24% / 13% / 6% rates.

e_invoicing.title: myDATA e-books platform
e_invoicing.summary: Real-time transmission of revenue/expense ledgers to AADE; phased mandate fully operational since 2021.

e_invoicing.title: Factura Electrónica en Línea (FEL)
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory FEL via SAT Guatemala for all taxpayers.

tax_filing.title: Hong Kong Profits Tax
tax_filing.summary: 16.5% profits tax; annual return to IRD. No VAT/GST.

vat_gst.title: Hungarian VAT
vat_gst.summary: Standard 27% / 18% / 5% rates — highest in EU.

e_invoicing.title: Hungary Real-Time Invoice Reporting (RTIR)
e_invoicing.summary: All B2B and B2C invoices reported in real time to NAV via XML.

tax_filing.title: Annual corporate + monthly VAT
tax_filing.summary: Annual CIT; monthly VAT (PPN) returns.

vat_gst.title: Indonesia VAT (PPN) — 12% from 2025
vat_gst.summary: 12% VAT (raised from 11% Jan 2025); limited to luxury initially per latest regulation.

e_invoicing.title: e-Faktur — limited mandate; digital services VAT expanding
e_invoicing.summary: All VAT-registered businesses issue tax invoices via DJP e-Faktur platform; digital services VAT expanding.

payroll.title: BPJS Health + Employment
payroll.summary: MEDIUM complexity: BPJS Kesehatan (health) + BPJS Ketenagakerjaan (employment).

local_gaap.title: Indonesian FAS (PSAK) — converging with IFRS
local_gaap.summary: PSAK standards converging with IFRS.

banking_payments.title: QRIS for QR payments + BI-FAST
banking_payments.summary: QRIS national QR standard; BI-FAST for instant interbank.

tax_filing.title: Annual Corporation Tax (CT1)
tax_filing.summary: Form CT1 annual return; corporate rate 12.5% (trading) / 25% (passive).

vat_gst.title: Irish VAT — bi-monthly returns
vat_gst.summary: Standard 23% / 13.5% / 9% / 0% rates. Bi-monthly returns to Revenue.

e_invoicing.title: PEPPOL B2G + voluntary B2B
e_invoicing.summary: Government B2G PEPPOL receipt; voluntary B2B adoption.

vat_gst.title: Israeli VAT — 18% (Jan 2025)
vat_gst.summary: 18% VAT (raised from 17% in Jan 2025); monthly returns.

tax_filing.title: Quarterly GSTR-1/3B + annual return + statutory audit
tax_filing.summary: Quarterly GSTR-1 and GSTR-3B; annual GSTR-9; mandatory statutory audit for all companies (Companies Act).

vat_gst.title: GST e-invoicing — IRP portal real-time, threshold ₹5 Cr
vat_gst.summary: B2B e-invoicing via IRP mandatory for taxpayers with aggregate turnover >₹5 Cr (since Aug 2023); JSON schema, real-time clearance. Multi-rate 5%/12%/18%/28%.

e_invoicing.title: Mandatory GST e-invoicing via IRP
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory IRP portal real-time clearance; QR + IRN.

payroll.title: PF (12%+12%) + ESI + multi-state professional tax
payroll.summary: HIGH (multi-state) complexity: Provident Fund 12%+12%, ESI, professional tax varies by state.

local_gaap.title: Ind AS (IFRS-converged with carve-outs)
local_gaap.summary: Ind AS for companies above thresholds; IFRS-converged with India-specific carve-outs.

banking_payments.title: UPI dominant for real-time payments
banking_payments.summary: Unified Payments Interface dominates Indian retail payments — 14B+ monthly transactions.

banking_payments.title: Account Aggregator framework
banking_payments.summary: RBI Account Aggregator framework — open banking equivalent for consented financial data sharing.

tax_filing.title: Annual IRES + IRAP returns
tax_filing.summary: Corporate income tax (IRES 24%) + regional production tax (IRAP ~3.9%). Quarterly VAT liquidation.

vat_gst.title: Italian VAT — monthly/quarterly LIPE
vat_gst.summary: Standard 22% / 10% / 4% rates. Monthly or quarterly returns plus LIPE quarterly liquidation report.

e_invoicing.title: FatturaPA — universal e-invoicing via SDI (clearance model)
e_invoicing.summary: All B2B, B2C, B2G invoices in FatturaPA XML through Sistema di Interscambio. Clearance model — invoice not legally valid until SDI accepts.

payroll.title: INPS contributions + TFR severance
payroll.summary: HIGH (~30% employer): INPS social security, TFR mandatory severance fund (1/13.5 of annual salary), regional taxes.

local_gaap.title: Italian GAAP (OIC standards)
local_gaap.summary: No mandatory CoA but OIC accounting principles require specific account treatments; goodwill must be amortised (differs from IFRS).

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + PagoPA for government payments
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 open banking + SEPA. PagoPA is the mandatory platform for all payments to public administration.

tax_filing.title: Annual corporate tax + consumption tax return
tax_filing.summary: Annual corporate tax + consumption tax filings to NTA.

vat_gst.title: Japanese Consumption Tax — 10%
vat_gst.summary: 10% JCT (8% reduced for food/non-alcoholic beverages); annual return.

e_invoicing.title: Qualified Invoice System (QIS)
e_invoicing.summary: Qualified invoice system in effect since Oct 2023; impacts JCT credit eligibility.

e_invoicing.title: Voluntary PEPPOL PINT v1.1.1 from May 2025
e_invoicing.summary: Voluntary PEPPOL PINT v1.1.1 specification adoption from May 2025.

payroll.title: Shared employer/employee insurance ~15%
payroll.summary: MEDIUM: Health, pension, employment, workers' comp insurance — shared between employer and employee.

local_gaap.title: JGAAP (Japanese GAAP)
local_gaap.summary: JGAAP required for unconsolidated; IFRS optional for consolidated. JGAAP differs significantly from IFRS.

banking_payments.title: Zengin system + cashless growth
banking_payments.summary: Zengin clearing system; cashless payments (QR/IC card) growing rapidly under MOF initiative.

tax_filing.title: Annual income tax + monthly VAT
tax_filing.summary: Annual income tax via iTax; monthly VAT filings.

vat_gst.title: Kenya VAT — 16%
vat_gst.summary: 16% VAT; monthly returns to KRA.

e_invoicing.title: eTIMS mandatory since Jan 2024 — JSON to KRA
e_invoicing.summary: eTIMS electronic Tax Invoice Management System mandatory for all VAT-registered businesses; JSON transmission to KRA.

payroll.title: NSSF + NHIF + Housing Levy
payroll.summary: MEDIUM: NSSF + NHIF (now SHIF) + Affordable Housing Levy 1.5% (introduced 2024).

local_gaap.title: IFRS mandatory
local_gaap.summary: IFRS mandatory for all entities; IFRS for SMEs allowed.

banking_payments.title: M-Pesa dominant + PesaLink
banking_payments.summary: M-Pesa dominates payments; PesaLink for inter-bank instant transfers.

e_invoicing.title: Korean Electronic Tax Invoice
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory e-tax invoicing via NTS for all VAT-registered businesses.

vat_gst.title: Luxembourg VAT
vat_gst.summary: Standard 17% / 14% / 8% / 3% rates.

tax_filing.title: Monthly provisional + annual return to SAT
tax_filing.summary: Monthly provisional payments + annual ISR return.

vat_gst.title: Mexican IVA — 16% with withholding
vat_gst.summary: 16% IVA; specific withholding requirements for digital services and platforms.

e_invoicing.title: CFDI 4.0 mandatory via PAC
e_invoicing.summary: All electronic invoices in CFDI 4.0 format stamped through certified PAC; clearance model since 2014.

e_invoicing.title: Carta Porte 3.1 supplement
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory transport supplement (Carta Porte) with detailed logistics data.

payroll.title: Nómina CFDI digital payroll receipts
payroll.summary: Employers must issue payroll CFDI receipts stamped through PAC.

payroll.title: IMSS (~24%) + Infonavit (5%)
payroll.summary: HIGH complexity: IMSS social security ~24% + Infonavit 5% + state payroll tax.

local_gaap.title: NIF (Mexican Financial Reporting Standards)
local_gaap.summary: NIF converging with IFRS; mandatory for non-listed entities.

banking_payments.title: SPEI real-time + CoDi mobile
banking_payments.summary: SPEI for real-time interbank; CoDi for mobile QR payments.

tax_filing.title: Annual income tax + bi-monthly SST
tax_filing.summary: Annual income tax (24% corporate); bi-monthly SST returns.

vat_gst.title: Malaysia SST — Sales 10% / Service 8%
vat_gst.summary: SST replaces GST; Sales Tax 10% + Service Tax 8% (raised from 6% Mar 2024).

e_invoicing.title: Malaysia e-invoicing — Aug 2024 (>RM100M)
e_invoicing.summary: Phase 1: businesses with revenue >RM100M from 1 Aug 2024.

e_invoicing.title: Malaysia e-invoicing — Jul 2025 (>RM5M)
e_invoicing.summary: Phase 2: businesses >RM5M from 1 Jul 2025; structured digital invoices via MyInvois (CTC clearance model).

e_invoicing.title: Malaysia e-invoicing — Jul 2026 (all)
e_invoicing.summary: Phase 3: ALL businesses from 1 Jul 2026.

payroll.title: EPF + SOCSO + EIS
payroll.summary: MEDIUM complexity: EPF Provident Fund + SOCSO social security + EIS employment insurance.

local_gaap.title: MFRS (IFRS-aligned)
local_gaap.summary: Malaysian Financial Reporting Standards substantially aligned with IFRS.

banking_payments.title: DuitNow + growing digital payments
banking_payments.summary: DuitNow real-time payments; QR adoption accelerating.

tax_filing.title: Annual income tax + monthly VAT
tax_filing.summary: Annual CIT; monthly VAT filings.

vat_gst.title: Nigeria VAT — 7.5%
vat_gst.summary: 7.5% VAT (raised from 5% in 2020); monthly returns to FIRS.

e_invoicing.title: Merchant Buyer Solution (MBS) — Aug 2025 (>5B NGN)
e_invoicing.summary: MBS e-invoicing emerging for taxpayers >5B NGN turnover from Aug 2025; phased expansion.

payroll.title: Pension (8%+10%) + NHF
payroll.summary: MEDIUM: Pension Reform Act contributions (8% employee + 10% employer) + National Housing Fund.

local_gaap.title: IFRS for listed; SAS for SMEs
local_gaap.summary: IFRS mandatory for listed/public-interest entities; Statements of Accounting Standards for SMEs.

banking_payments.title: NIP for instant payments + mobile money
banking_payments.summary: NIBSS Instant Payments dominant; mobile money rapidly expanding.

tax_filing.title: Annual corporate tax (Vpb) + quarterly VAT
tax_filing.summary: Vennootschapsbelasting filed annually; VAT quarterly. Filed via Belastingdienst portal.

vat_gst.title: Dutch VAT — quarterly returns
vat_gst.summary: Standard 21% / reduced 9% rates. Quarterly returns; monthly for very large taxpayers.

e_invoicing.title: B2G e-invoicing via PEPPOL
e_invoicing.summary: All Dutch government agencies receive e-invoices via PEPPOL since 2017. Post-audit model.

e_invoicing.title: Netherlands B2B e-invoicing draft legislation Q4 2026
e_invoicing.summary: Draft legislation for B2B e-invoicing expected Q4 2026 ahead of EU ViDA July 2030 alignment.

payroll.title: Dutch payroll — social premiums + pension
payroll.summary: MEDIUM complexity: social premiums + occupational pension; quarterly payroll tax filings.

local_gaap.title: Dutch GAAP (RJ) or IFRS
local_gaap.summary: SMBs use Dutch GAAP (Raad voor de Jaarverslaggeving); listed entities IFRS.

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + iDEAL dominant
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 open banking + SEPA. iDEAL is dominant for online B2C payments; expanding to European Payment Initiative (Wero).

vat_gst.title: Norwegian VAT (MVA)
vat_gst.summary: Standard 25% / 15% / 12% rates. Bi-monthly returns to Skatteetaten.

e_invoicing.title: EHF / PEPPOL e-invoicing
e_invoicing.summary: All government bodies receive e-invoices via EHF/PEPPOL since 2012; B2B adoption strong.

tax_filing.title: Annual income tax + GST returns
tax_filing.summary: Annual income tax; GST returns 2 or 6-monthly.

vat_gst.title: NZ GST — 15% bi-monthly returns
vat_gst.summary: 15% GST; bi-monthly or 6-monthly returns to IRD.

e_invoicing.title: PEPPOL voluntary; govt agencies from Jan 2026
e_invoicing.summary: All government agencies must accept PEPPOL e-invoices from Jan 2026; B2B voluntary.

payroll.title: KiwiSaver minimum 3% employer
payroll.summary: LOW complexity: KiwiSaver pension 3% employer minimum; PAYE on each pay.

local_gaap.title: NZ IFRS
local_gaap.summary: NZ IFRS — substantially aligned with IFRS.

banking_payments.title: Open banking emerging
banking_payments.summary: Payments NZ API Centre standards; open banking emerging.

e_invoicing.title: Factura Electrónica Panamá
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory e-invoicing via DGI; phased rollout 2022-2025.

e_invoicing.title: Sistema de Emisión Electrónica (SEE)
e_invoicing.summary: All registered taxpayers issue electronic invoices through SUNAT SEE.

e_invoicing.title: BIR Electronic Invoicing System (EIS)
e_invoicing.summary: Top 100 large taxpayers and exporters required since Jul 2022; phased expansion ongoing.

vat_gst.title: Pakistan Sales Tax
vat_gst.summary: 17-18% Sales Tax; monthly returns to FBR.

vat_gst.title: Polish VAT + JPK_VAT SAF-T
vat_gst.summary: Standard 23% / 8% / 5% rates. Monthly JPK_VAT (SAF-T VAT) filing.

e_invoicing.title: KSeF mandatory B2B e-invoicing
e_invoicing.summary: KSeF mandatory for large taxpayers from 1 Feb 2026; all taxpayers from 1 Apr 2026. Real-time clearance model.

vat_gst.title: Portuguese VAT — monthly/quarterly
vat_gst.summary: Standard 23% / 13% / 6% rates.

e_invoicing.title: B2G e-invoicing mandatory
e_invoicing.summary: Government B2G e-invoicing mandatory since 2021 (large), 2022 (SMEs).

local_gaap.title: SAF-T (PT) monthly submission + ATCUD/QR
local_gaap.summary: Monthly SAF-T accounting file submission; certified invoicing software with ATCUD code and QR mandatory.

e_invoicing.title: SIFEN e-Kuatia (Paraguay)
e_invoicing.summary: Phased e-invoicing rollout via SIFEN; mandatory for large taxpayers.

vat_gst.title: Romanian VAT — monthly/quarterly
vat_gst.summary: Standard 19% / 9% / 5% rates.

e_invoicing.title: RO e-Factura B2B mandate
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory B2B e-invoicing through RO e-Factura platform since July 2024. Real-time clearance.

tax_filing.title: Quarterly VAT + Annual Zakat/income tax
tax_filing.summary: Quarterly VAT returns; annual Zakat (Saudi/GCC) or income tax (foreign) returns.

vat_gst.title: Saudi VAT — 15% standard rate
vat_gst.summary: 15% VAT (raised from 5% in Jul 2020); quarterly returns to ZATCA.

e_invoicing.title: ZATCA FATOORA Phase 2 — real-time clearance + QR + cryptographic stamp
e_invoicing.summary: Real-time clearance model with mandatory QR code and crypto stamp; rolling waves of taxpayer integration.

payroll.title: GOSI contributions ~12%
payroll.summary: Low complexity: GOSI social insurance ~12% employer; no personal income tax for residents.

local_gaap.title: IFRS mandatory (SOCPA)
local_gaap.summary: IFRS mandatory under SOCPA framework.

banking_payments.title: SARIE real-time + mada payments
banking_payments.summary: SARIE real-time gross settlement; mada is dominant card scheme.

tax_filing.title: Annual income declaration
tax_filing.summary: Annual income tax return via Skatteverket; corporate rate 20.6%.

vat_gst.title: Swedish VAT (moms) — monthly/quarterly
vat_gst.summary: Standard 25% / 12% / 6% rates. Monthly or quarterly returns to Skatteverket.

e_invoicing.title: PEPPOL mandatory for B2G since 2019
e_invoicing.summary: All public-sector invoices must be sent as PEPPOL BIS Billing 3.

e_invoicing.title: B2B PEPPOL adoption trending
e_invoicing.summary: Voluntary but rapidly growing B2B PEPPOL adoption; aligns with EU ViDA 2030.

payroll.title: Swedish payroll — employer social fees ~31%
payroll.summary: MEDIUM complexity: employer social fees (arbetsgivaravgifter) ~31%; monthly AGI reporting.

local_gaap.title: Swedish GAAP (BFN K2/K3) or IFRS
local_gaap.summary: K2/K3 frameworks per Bokföringsnämnden; listed entities IFRS.

banking_payments.title: PSD2 + SEPA + Swish + BankID
banking_payments.summary: PSD2 + SEPA. Swish dominant for instant payments; BankID for authentication.

tax_filing.title: Annual income tax + quarterly GST
tax_filing.summary: Annual corporate income tax (17%); quarterly GST.

vat_gst.title: Singapore GST — 9% (from Jan 2024)
vat_gst.summary: 9% GST (raised from 8% on 1 Jan 2024); quarterly returns to IRAS.

e_invoicing.title: InvoiceNow mandatory: Nov 2025 (new GST regs); Apr 2026+ (existing)
e_invoicing.summary: PEPPOL-based InvoiceNow mandatory for newly incorporated GST-registered businesses from 1 Nov 2025; existing GST-registered phased from 1 Apr 2026. Post-audit model.

payroll.title: CPF age-banded contributions ~17%
payroll.summary: LOW complexity: CPF (Central Provident Fund) age-banded employer contribution rates ~17%.

local_gaap.title: SFRS (IFRS-aligned)
local_gaap.summary: Singapore Financial Reporting Standards — substantially aligned with IFRS.

banking_payments.title: FAST + PayNow + SGFinDex open banking
banking_payments.summary: FAST/PayNow real-time rails; SGFinDex enables consented data sharing across banks.

e_invoicing.title: Thailand e-Tax Invoice
e_invoicing.summary: Voluntary e-Tax Invoice via Revenue Department; mandatory expansion ongoing.

e_invoicing.title: Turkey e-fatura / e-arşiv
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory e-invoicing for taxpayers above turnover thresholds; e-arşiv for B2C.

e_invoicing.title: Taiwan e-Unified Invoice
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory e-Unified Invoice for all VAT-registered businesses.

e_invoicing.title: Comprobante Fiscal Electrónico (CFE)
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory CFE e-invoicing via DGI.

vat_gst.title: Venezuelan IVA
vat_gst.summary: 16% IVA; monthly returns to SENIAT.

e_invoicing.title: Vietnam e-invoicing mandatory
e_invoicing.summary: Mandatory e-invoicing via GDT for all businesses since 1 July 2022.

tax_filing.title: Annual income tax + bi-monthly VAT via SARS eFiling
tax_filing.summary: All registered businesses file via SARS eFiling.

vat_gst.title: South Africa VAT — 15% standard rate
vat_gst.summary: 15% VAT; bi-monthly returns to SARS via eFiling.

e_invoicing.title: Proposed e-invoicing 2028 — SARS Central Tax Hub via PEPPOL
e_invoicing.summary: SARS plans to launch Central Tax Hub e-invoicing via PEPPOL in 2028.

payroll.title: UIF + SDL + PAYE
payroll.summary: MEDIUM complexity: UIF unemployment + Skills Development Levy + PAYE; monthly EMP201.

local_gaap.title: IFRS for listed; SA GAAP / IFRS for SMEs otherwise
local_gaap.summary: IFRS mandatory for listed; IFRS for SMEs typical for private companies.

banking_payments.title: Real-time clearing + strong banking infrastructure
banking_payments.summary: BankservAfrica RTC for real-time clearing; PayShap rolled out 2023.
